mano_cua.result_summary: 侧边栏滚动bug确认：侧边栏可以向下滚动显示底部导航项（Chat到Theme Selector），但向上滚动完全失效（尝试15次滚轮向上均无响应）。一旦向下滚动后，顶部导航项（Getting Started、Introduction、Installation、Avatar Group、Button）永久无法通过侧边栏内滚动访问。侧边栏无滚动条显示。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Sidebar scrolling bug confirmed: can scroll down but cannot scroll back up. After scrolling down, top navigation items become permanently inaccessible via sidebar scroll. No scrollbar visible.
